lesson.menu_desc: There is / there are for the coffee farms Carlos verifies -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 13 -- Describing Places and Properties: The Coffee Farms I Verify
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Carlos Eduardo | Aula 13 -- There Is / There Are (Farm Properties)

listenings.text: Let me describe one coffee property I verify in the south of Minas Gerais. The farm is in a rural area, near the municipality of Varginha. It is a large property, and it is registered and active in the Impact program. On the property, there is a small processing unit, where the coffee cherries become green beans. There are two storage areas for the coffee bags, near the main house. Between the two storage areas, there is a water tank. The boundary of the farm is clear, with a line of tall trees. There is no certified warehouse yet, but the producer is building one. It is a remote farm, so the road is long, but the view is beautiful.

Hi Carlos, this is Amara from the Sucafina team in Kenya. Thank you for the description of the property. I have a few questions before my visit. Is the farm near a town, or is it very remote? Are there storage areas for the coffee bags on the property? And is there a certified warehouse, or not yet? I want to understand the place before I arrive. Please tell me what is on the property and what is near the boundary. I am very excited to see a coffee farm in Brazil for the first time. Thank you, Carlos.

extra_audio.text: First, the farm is in a rural area, near the municipality of Varginha. There is a small processing unit on the property. There are two storage areas near the main house. Between the storage areas, there is a water tank. There is no certified warehouse yet, but the producer is building one.
